The '''Brommstaad Mercenaries''', also referred to as the '''Bromstaad boys''' [sic], were a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] outfit hired by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] for work on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. There, they worked for [[Zekka Thyne]] before he was sent to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]. While on Corellia, they got into a fight with [[Riij Winward]] and [[Rathe Palror]], a fight they nearly won if not for the timely arrival of [[Hal Horn|Hal]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]. Most known members were either killed or captured when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] [[Capture of Zekka Thyne|raided]] Thyne's [[Zekka Thyne's fortress|fortress]].<ref name="Side Trip" />
